title: Golden Globes 2026 Winner Predictions In All Movie Categories
text: Best Actress in a Motion Picture - Musical or Comedy Predictions. Nominees: Amanda Seyfried ('The Testament of Ann Lee'); Chase Infiniti ('One Battle After Another'); Cynthia Erivo ('Wicked: For Good'); Emma Stone ('Bugonia'); Kate Hudson ('Song Sung Blue'); Rose Byrne ('If I Had Legs, I'd Kick You'). Prediction: Rose Byrne. Analysis: The critic identifies this as 'another close race' primarily between two contenders. Emma Stone represents the safer pick, having won this award twice before and bringing the backing of three total Globe nominations for 'Bugonia'. However, the prediction favors Byrne, noting her widely recognized performance and viewing this award 'as the latest stepping stone for her to get an Oscar nomination.' The analysis suggests her acclaim over nearly a year positions her favorably for both the Golden Globe and subsequent Academy recognition.
